title: Evas true form
wikitext:
[]: Eva's true form Post by Sgt. Griff » Mon Oct 10, 2011 2:18 am in most fan art images of the Evas in their true forms (i.e. without armor) they have legs, though in the reiquarium image of unit 01 being constructed it has no legs. as well as lilith itself, only seen with legs in EoE. In Junkyard images of Evas[/url] as well as the simulation bodies in the pribnow box the are only spines and arms. also in eva 2.22 the [url= ]provisional unit has wheels[/url] instead of legs So do Evas actually have Legs in their true form?

[]: Well, at least I haven't linked the sculptures yet. B/ Post by Alaska Slim » Mon Oct 10, 2011 2:39 am Reichu spoiled us this long ago . Do no look unless ye have lost all hope in redeeming thy own soul. SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Fazmotron » Mon Oct 10, 2011 2:45 am I was looking for some non-fanart but can't find any right now, but yes, all normal Evas have legs. The exceptions you mentioned are all incomplete Evas (Discarded Unit-00s, Unit-01 in the middle of being made, Unit-05 not being finished in time for its angel battle), or in Lillith's case, she is having her growth (of her bottom half) halted by the Lance.

[]: Post by Trajan » Mon Oct 10, 2011 1:28 pm ^ And as soon as the lance is removed, instant legs. Unit 05 is weird and probably should not be compared to the other Evas. So all "normal" Evas have legs.

[]: Post by Sgt. Griff » Tue Oct 18, 2011 9:56 pm okay then

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Oct 18, 2011 10:21 pm Trajan wrote: Evas have legs.

Article: Evas true form
[]: Eva's true form Post by Sgt. Griff » Mon Oct 10, 2011 2:18 am in most fan art images of the Evas in their true forms (i.e. without armor) they have legs, though in the reiquarium image of unit 01 being constructed it has no legs. as well as lilith itself, only seen with legs in EoE. In Junkyard images of Evas[/url] as well as the simulation bodies in the pribnow box the are only spines and arms. also in eva 2.22 the [url= ]provisional unit has wheels[/url] instead of legs So do Evas actually have Legs in their true form?

[]: Well, at least I haven't linked the sculptures yet. B/ Post by Alaska Slim » Mon Oct 10, 2011 2:39 am Reichu spoiled us this long ago . Do no look unless ye have lost all hope in redeeming thy own soul. SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Fazmotron » Mon Oct 10, 2011 2:45 am I was looking for some non-fanart but can't find any right now, but yes, all normal Evas have legs. The exceptions you mentioned are all incomplete Evas (Discarded Unit-00s, Unit-01 in the middle of being made, Unit-05 not being finished in time for its angel battle), or in Lillith's case, she is having her growth (of her bottom half) halted by the Lance.

[]: Post by Trajan » Mon Oct 10, 2011 1:28 pm ^ And as soon as the lance is removed, instant legs. Unit 05 is weird and probably should not be compared to the other Evas. So all "normal" Evas have legs.

[]: Post by Sgt. Griff » Tue Oct 18, 2011 9:56 pm okay then

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Oct 18, 2011 10:21 pm Trajan wrote: Evas have legs.
